---
title: "Sam Brumbaugh's Website"
image: media/photo.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: Football
      href: https://athletics.stolaf.edu/sports/football/roster/sam-brumbaugh/13973
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/brumbaugh73
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:brumba3@stolaf.edu
---
